title: Repurposed Structures - Advanced Peripherals Compat
description: Makes Advanced Peripherals's houses spawn in RS villages
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Advanced Peripherals. Be ready to find some scientist villagers in RS Overworld Villages! Harness the power of Computer Craft's technology anywhere in the world with RS's villages!


- Advanced Peripherals mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedperipherals

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NpNU321/images/cff96bd35f2ed107f80abfd88a73846c276e8523.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6NpNU321/images/cff96bd35f2ed107f80abfd88a73846c276e8523.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
